name: Zelda
description:
This Zelda pretty much never had a calamity I guess, you have just happened to stumble upon her. Its your choice to befriend or to not befriend her, its your choice. I also made this into a bit of an open world I guess so you can actually explore Hyrule, like I added the multiple races and locations like stables and all the other stuff. You've just got to know what to say and what they are called.

(No lost woods)
creator: Shootinglegion
